values.name: LOCATION_LOCAL
values.summary: The option is local to the location of the code completion query - e.g. a local variable. Subsequent value of location represent options from the outer class, the exact value represent how far they are (in terms of inner classes).

values.name: LOCATION_OTHER
values.summary: The option is from other engine code, not covered by the other enum constants - e.g. built-in classes.

values.name: LOCATION_OTHER_USER_CODE
values.summary: The option is from user code which is not local and not in a derived class (e.g. Autoload Singletons).

values.name: LOCATION_PARENT_MASK
values.summary: The option is from the containing class or a parent class, relative to the location of the code completion query. Perform a bitwise OR with the class depth (e.g. [code]0[/code] for the local class, [code]1[/code] for the parent, [code]2[/code] for the grandparent, etc.) to store the depth of an option in the class or a parent class.

constants.name: LOCATION_LOCAL
constants.summary: The option is local to the location of the code completion query - e.g. a local variable. Subsequent value of location represent options from the outer class, the exact value represent how far they are (in terms of inner classes).

constants.name: LOCATION_PARENT_MASK
constants.summary: The option is from the containing class or a parent class, relative to the location of the code completion query. Perform a bitwise OR with the class depth (e.g. [code]0[/code] for the local class, [code]1[/code] for the parent, [code]2[/code] for the grandparent, etc.) to store the depth of an option in the class or a parent class.

constants.name: LOCATION_OTHER_USER_CODE
constants.summary: The option is from user code which is not local and not in a derived class (e.g. Autoload Singletons).

constants.name: LOCATION_OTHER
constants.summary: The option is from other engine code, not covered by the other enum constants - e.g. built-in classes.
